summary: Role Management UI feature tested successfully. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Page loads with all 14 built-in roles + custom roles displayed. Create/Edit/Delete role modals functional. Permission selection via individual checkboxes works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Select All button in permission groups may not work reliably due to event propagation (button nested inside another button). Individual checkbox selection works correctly.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/roles returns list of roles with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/roles/{role_id} returns specific role details
Backend: POST /api/roles creates new custom role
Backend: POST /api/roles/{role_id}/reset resets built-in role to defaults
Backend: Error handling for duplicate role ID, built-in role ID, invalid permissions
Frontend: Role Management page loads correctly with data-testid='role-management-page'
Frontend: Create Role button visible and clickable
Frontend: All 14 built-in role cards displayed (Admin, PreSales, Designer, etc.)
Frontend: Role cards show permission count and user count
Frontend: Create Role modal opens with form fields (Role ID, Display Name, Description)
Frontend: Edit Role modal opens with pre-filled data and disabled Role ID
Frontend: Permission groups expandable with individual checkbox selection
Frontend: Sidebar shows Roles link for admin users with admin.assign_permissions
Frontend: Navigation to /roles works from sidebar
E2E: Create role via UI - form submission, success toast, role appears in list
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix Select All button event propagation - the button is nested inside another button element (lines 459-488 in RoleManagement.jsx). Consider moving Select All button outside the parent button or using a different approach.
critical_code_review_comments: RoleManagement.jsx: Well-structured component with proper state management and API integration
Backend server.py: Role management endpoints (lines 2850-3112) properly implement CRUD with permission validation
Sidebar.jsx: Correctly checks hasPermission('admin.assign_permissions') to show Roles link (line 324)
Minor: Select All button nested inside parent button (line 477-487) may cause click event issues
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test roles: TestRoleAPI, E2ETestRole1770145978
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role Management feature is fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/roles (GET, POST), /api/roles/{id} (GET, PUT, DELETE), /api/roles/{id}/reset (POST) all working. Frontend page at /roles route accessible to users with admin.assign_permissions. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_role_management.py can be reused for regression testing. Existing custom role 'TestCustomRole' in database.
